title: Suger Product
description: A cloud marketplace product listing managed through the Suger platform.

orgId.description: Organization ID that owns this product

description.description: Product description shown in marketplace listings

partner.description: Cloud marketplace partner where the product is listed

status.description: Current publication status of the product

fulfillmentUrl.description: URL to redirect buyers after purchasing the product

dimensions.description: Metering dimensions available for usage-based billing

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product was last updated
